header.subtitle: HIRE DEDICATED DEVELOPERS
header.title: Scale your engineering team with AI-native talent.

intro.text: Get access to our senior engineers, product managers, and UI/UX designers as an extension of your own team. Whether you need a single specialized developer or a complete pod to accelerate your roadmap, we provide the talent to help you ship faster.

model.subtitle: HOW IT WORKS
model.title: Flexible, high-impact team augmentation
model.description: Skip the months-long hiring process. Plug our experienced, AI-native developers directly into your existing workflows and start shipping features this week.

advantages.title: Immediate Onboarding
advantages.desc: Skip the recruiting and training phases. Our engineers are ready to contribute to your codebase from day one.

advantages.title: AI-Augmented Talent
advantages.desc: You're not just getting a developer; you're getting an engineer fluent in the latest AI coding workflows, multiplying their output.

advantages.title: Flexible Scaling
advantages.desc: Scale your team up or down based on your roadmap's demands without the overhead of full-time employment contracts.

advantages.title: Managed Delivery
advantages.desc: Our developers are supported by our internal tech leads and infrastructure, ensuring code quality and best practices.

cta.title: Need to accelerate your roadmap?
cta.description: Let's discuss your technical requirements and team culture to find the perfect engineering fit.
